name: Thalarian Queller

abilities.name: Follow the Flames
abilities.text: When this model declares an attack action, if the target has a Burning token, this model's action receives a (+).

abilities.name: Suppress Magic
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" must discard a card to drain (soulstone).

abilities.name: Thalarian Doctrine
abilities.text: When an ally within 6" removes a Shielded token to reduce damage, it reduces 1 additional damage.

actions.name: War Staff
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(magic)8".

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

actions.name: Anti-Magic Burst
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Remove all tokens from the target. If this action removes at least two tokens, this model may make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Dark Remedy
triggers.text: This model or the target heals 2.

triggers.name: Twist the Truth
triggers.text: An ally within 1" of the target gains a Shielded token.

actions.name: Quell Magic
actions.effects: The target gains a Suppressed token.

extraction_notes: STN: 9 value visible at bottom of portrait
